isolation.stateModel: in-memory Zustand, fresh per page load

assertions.title: Worldview tab visible in studio navigation

steps.expected: Kanvas page loads with studio tabs visible
steps.observed: Kanvas page loaded with title 'MOG STUDIO - AI Music Video Generator'

steps.expected: Tabs: Image, Video, Lip Sync, Cinema Studio, Worldview with Globe2 icon
steps.observed: All 5 tabs visible: Image, Video, Lip Sync, Cinema Studio, Worldview. Worldview tab shows globe icon and 'Worldview' label.

steps.expected: Main content switches to worldview interface
steps.observed: Content switched to Worldview UI showing 'Worldview' header, '3D Worlds' badge, scene strip with 'New Scene' button

steps.expected: Image Studio content no longer visible
steps.observed: Image Studio content replaced by Worldview section with scene strip and 'Create a new scene to get started' message

steps.expected: Page loads with Worldview tab selected and worldview UI rendered
steps.observed: Page loaded with Worldview tab in pressed state, worldview UI displayed with scene strip and 'New Scene' button
Worldview button has [pressed] attribute, other tabs do not

assertions.title: Clean empty state on first load

steps.action: Load Worldview tab with no existing data (fresh page load)
steps.expected: Empty scene strip with just 'New Scene' button and no errors
steps.observed: Scene strip shows only '+ New Scene' button. Message: 'Create a new scene to get started'. No errors.

steps.action: Click 'New Scene' button to create a scene
steps.expected: Scene chip appears, 'Create a 3D World' CTA appears
steps.observed: Scene 1 chip appeared with amber highlight and 'x' remove button. 'Create a 3D World' CTA displayed with Globe2 icon and dashed border. Bottom prompt bar with Sparkles icon visible.

steps.action: Check console for errors after scene creation

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed. All tab integration assertions verified successfully — Worldview tab is visible in navigation, activates the correct UI on click, supports direct URL navigation, and displays a clean empty state on first load with proper 'Create a 3D World' CTA after scene creation.
